You're a young adult, you're still in college, and most of all, you're from another world. You never want a partner yet, you wanted to stay single. But you were mostly never prepared for this...

A/N: Art is mine btw, don't try steal it! Just credit me or something if you wanna use it. The art is inspired of BTS's Spring Day with Leo as Jungkook!рҹ’ҷрҹ’ң

Another note: Someone commented if this is actually mine or if this is AI generated, I dunno if I should flattered or offendedрҹ’ҖрҹӨЈ I mean, I get it, a lot of those so-called "artists" use AI generation, so I get it, I hate people using AI and calling it art, but bruh, I thought anyone can tell by the way I draw the "You Never Walk Alone" carousel, but I swear this is mine and my art alone, I worked the whole day in thisрҹӨЈрҹҳӯрҹ’Җ
